name: real_twospeaker_en

turns.speaker: Speaker 1
turns.text: CONCORD RETURNED TO ITS PLACE AMIDST THE TENTS

turns.speaker: Speaker 1
turns.text: CONGRATULATIONS WERE POURED IN UPON THE PRINCESS EVERYWHERE DURING HER JOURNEY

turns.speaker: Speaker 2
turns.text: NOTWITHSTANDING THE HIGH RESOLUTION OF HAWKEYE HE FULLY COMPREHENDED ALL THE DIFFICULTIES AND DANGER HE WAS ABOUT TO INCUR

turns.speaker: Speaker 2
turns.text: THERE WAS SOMETHING IN HIS AIR AND MANNER THAT BETRAYED TO THE SCOUT THE UTTER CONFUSION OF THE STATE OF HIS MIND

_provenance: Two sequential LibriSpeech test-clean utterances from distinct speakers (CC BY 4.0, https://openslr.org/12), concatenated with 0.2s gaps. Real speech so the Sortformer produces speaker activity (synthetic carrier-tone fixtures read as silence).
